title: elaphoglossum strictum
intro: Elaphoglossum strictum, a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, is a type of epiphytic plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum strictum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce pain and swelling, and prevent the growth of bacteria and other microorganisms. Elaphoglossum strictum is typically prepared for herbal use through infusion, decoction, or tincture, with the leaves and stems being harvested and dried for later use.
